rulings.Case Title: JAMES BRECHT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Defendants Maersk Line, Limited And Maersk, Inc.S Request For Admissions To Be Deemed Admitted And For Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 13, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Defendants Maersk Line, Limited and Maersk Line, Inc¿s motions for requests for admissions to be deemed admitted is granted. (CCP 2033.280(b)). No opposition filed. Defendants¿ request for terminating sanctions is denied. (See Doppes v. Bentley Motors, Inc. (2009) 174 Cal.App.4th 967, 992; Mileikowsky v. Tenet Healthsystem (2005) 128 Cal.App.4th 262, 279-280 Hearing required unless defendants¿ counsel advises the plaintiffs of the tentative ruling and the plaintiffs state that they do not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: OMAR BUCHANAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Deposition Of Charles Ay
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 13, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 3. Defendant Dana Companies¿ motion for a protective order re deposition of Charles Ay: hearing required. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to attempt to find a solution that minimizes the cost and inconvenience to all parties. = (220/HEK)
